title: eriosema tessmannii
intro: Eriosema tessmannii, also known as the Tessmann's eriosema or African kidney bean, is a plant species in the legume family that is native to tropical Africa. The plant's leaves and stems contain medicinal compounds that have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. Eriosema tessmannii is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing swelling and fighting off infections. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various ailments.
